subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Lankershim in Los Angeles, 1912-10-20
subcodes.first_line: If they have good intentions for the Cause of God, they must render some service and they must go out to teach the Cause. If they are able, they should raise the cry
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر اینها هم مقصد خیری در امر الله دارند باید بخدمتی موفق شوند و بروند تبلیغ امر الله نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
